pi_items.verified_value: Dashboard initially uses old_ups_* feeds instead of server_* feeds
pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh lines 106-152: Initial dashboard widgets reference OLD_POWER_ID, OLD_TEMP_ID, OLD_HUM_ID

privileged_info_summary: The task creates synthetic test data: three Emoncms feeds named 'server_power' (2450W), 'server_temp' (22.5°C), and 'server_humidity' (45%RH), all tagged 'server_room'. The dashboard 'Server Room Overview' is initially misconfigured with dial and feedvalue widgets pointing to old_ups_* feeds instead. The task requires reconfiguring the widgets to use the correct server_* feeds with specified parameters: power dial max=5000W, temperature dial min=10/max=45°C, humidity feedvalue display. No real PII, credentials, or user data is involved. All data and environment are local and synthetic.
